title: Finalizing Summer 2022 Trip — Egypt vs Vietnam
html:
Decision-day doc (7/5/2022) weighing egypt (Alexandria, ~$850 ticket spiking unpredictably) vs vietnam (very cheap, possible HongKong train extension), with Morocco as the Portland-departure alternative ruled out for time. The trip ultimately becomes Vietnam (per 2022 10 15 Thoughts on 8212022 — "I will then leave to vietnam... Alone"). Sets up budget categories: boarding, food, ground travel, attractions, souvenirs.

TL;DR

  • 7/5/2022 decision day: egypt vs vietnam for solo summer trip — finances vs adventure.
  • Hong Kong train extension floated as Vietnam upside.
  • Morocco ruled out for being too far from a 1-week window.
  • Trip will end up as vietnam solo (confirmed by 2022 10 15 Thoughts on 8212022).
  • "Talk to deezy" — early travel-buddy consult, david morris presumed.

vietnam · egypt · traveling thesis · david morris · 2022 10 15 Thoughts on 8212022
